title: Add ability to import spreadsheet to a multi-choice form question
excerpt:
Needing the ability to have a multi-choice question on a form and import a list directly from my spreadsheet to that question.

posts.author: slgreebon (Shanice Greebon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Needing the ability to have a multi-choice question on a form and import a list directly from my spreadsheet to that question.

Example: This form will have options to choose a country. Making a short multi-choice list of countries with Other being one. Making Other conditional so if selected they’re then required to choose from a long list of other countries.
